scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @milestone/api-primary" "npm run dev -w @milestone/client-primary"
scripts.docker:build: npm run build --workspace=@milestone/data --workspace=@milestone/js-common --workspace=@milestone/client-primary && esbuild apps/api-primary-node/src/index.ts --platform=node --packages=external --bundle --format=esm --outdir=dist --tsconfig=apps/api-primary-node/tsconfig.json && rm -rf public && cp -r apps/client-primary/dist public
